speeches.speaker: Greg
speeches.text: Who touched the US-East repo?

speeches.speaker: L5 engineer
speeches.text: Nobody! It’s a cascade. The primary database is locking up.

speeches.speaker: Greg
speeches.text: Where is the failover?

speeches.speaker: L5 engineer
speeches.text: It's... it's looping back! Routing paradox!

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: Greg, my phone is vibrating. The board is asking why our enterprise SLAs are currently bleeding out on the floor. Care to illuminate us?

speeches.speaker: Greg
speeches.text: We're managing it, Richard. The load balancer is choking. I have to hard-reset the US-East cluster.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: A hard reset, Greg? Fascinating strategy. I suppose our legal department has been looking for an excuse to work weekends. Three million users losing twelve hours of data should keep them busy.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: It’s a necessary amputation, Evelyn! Do it. Now.

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: Greg, wait.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: Who gave you clearance for the command desk? Get away from that terminal!

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: You don't have a routing paradox, Greg. You have a traffic jam in your garbage collection.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: Security! Get this... whoever this is, out of my building!

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: I'm bypassing the load balancer.

speeches.speaker: Greg
speeches.text: You're spinning up a virtual shard on the fly! Only L9 architects can bypass load balancers on the fly! That takes weeks!

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: Only if you read the manual.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: What did you just do?

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: A lucky parlor trick. You bypassed protocol, endangered client data, and insubordinated your CTO. Security is going to help you find the exit. Clear your desk.

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: Richard.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: Rotate the camera. I want to see the parlor trick.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: Who are you?

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: Marcus Vance. Formerly NovaTech.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: Vance? The architect who built the NovaTech framework?

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: An L3. Richard, you truly are a marvel. You had a top-tier architect slumming it in your junior pool and didn't even know it. Why the charade, Marcus?

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: The Jira tickets are very soothing. And nobody asks me about synergy.

speeches.speaker: Richard Sterling
speeches.text: I... I wasn't informed...

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: Clearly. Richard, we will discuss your crisis management protocols at the board meeting tomorrow. For now, step aside.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: So, Marcus. You clearly still care if the ship sinks.

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: I'm not looking for a management role. I down-leveled for a reason.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: Call it whatever title you want. Rebuild the architecture from the studs up. Take over as Chief Architect. Just fix my backend.

speeches.speaker: Marcus Vance
speeches.text: I'm going to need a lot of server space. And we're killing the morning stand-ups.

speeches.speaker: Evelyn Vance
speeches.text: Draft the memo. Welcome back to the top, Marcus.

subtext.hiddenMeaning: Mocking Greg's incompetence and threatening his job.

subtext.surfaceMeaning: Only if you read the manual.
subtext.hiddenMeaning: You are incompetent and didn't do your homework.
I am hiding from the corporate world because I am burnt out.

subtext.surfaceMeaning: You care if the ship sinks.
subtext.hiddenMeaning: I have you trapped; you can't help but fix this.

exposition.content: Only L9 architects can bypass load balancers on the fly.
Marcus Vance built the NovaTech framework.
